title: schotia bequaertii
intro: Schotia bequaertii, also known as the Congo plum or African bloodwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Schotia bequaertii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
